summary: Canonical issue #7227 remains the live representative for the Accessibility-to-node report, but the hydrated preflight marks it security-sensitive, so it is routed to central OpenClaw security handling with no Clownfish close/comment/label mutation. Open issue #69799 is related macOS TCC packaging architecture work with unique remaining scope and should stay open.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive boundary claim tied to macOS Accessibility/GUI automation must be quarantined for central OpenClaw security handling, not dedupe cleanup.
Related but not a true duplicate: #69799 has unique remaining architecture scope and should remain open for macOS runtime/TCC packaging work.
